message:
update(core,cli,layout,render,wasm): deterministic degradation engine with operator algebra

Replace ad-hoc degradation logic in fm-layout with a principled,
deterministic degradation engine in fm-core. Key additions:

- MermaidQualityMode enum (QualityFirst/Auto/Balanced/LatencyFirst)
  for user-selectable quality bias
- DegradationOperator enum with canonical ordering (cheapest-first)
  and ordinal-based tie-breaking for reproducible operator selection
- DegradationContext + compute_degradation_plan() for trigger-driven
  operator application based on pressure tier and budget signals
- compute_degradation_plan_with_trace() for audit/observability
- MermaidDegradationPlan::explain() for human-readable degradation
  summaries with remediation guidance
- MermaidDegradationPlan::is_degraded() predicate

Integrate degradation plan into all render surfaces:
- fm-render-svg: SvgRenderConfig::apply_degradation() disables
  shadows, gradients, glow; downgrades detail tier on Compact/Outline
- fm-render-term: TermRenderConfig::apply_degradation() forces ASCII
  glyphs, hides labels, collapses clusters, sets CellOnly mode
- fm-cli: thread degradation plan through RenderSurfaceOptions to
  all output formats (SVG, PNG, Term, ASCII); emit degradation fields
  in JSON output for render and validate commands; print degradation
  summary in validate text output
- fm-wasm: apply degradation to SVG config in render(), render_svg_js(),
  and Diagram::update() paths
- fm-layout: delegate to compute_degradation_plan() instead of inline
  conditionals in build_layout_guard_report_with_pressure()

Also: reformat enum variant fields in diff.rs (NodeChange, EdgeChange)
to multi-line style; update .beads/issues.jsonl with issue status.

Comprehensive test coverage: 15+ tests across fm-core, fm-render-svg,
and fm-render-term covering operator ordering, determinism, canonical
application, explain output, and apply_degradation noop/active paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7,9 +7,8 @@ use std::f32::consts::PI;
 use fm_core::{
     DiagramType, GanttDate, GanttExclude, GanttTaskType, GraphDirection, IrEndpoint, IrGanttMeta,
     IrNode, IrXyChartMeta, IrXySeriesKind, MermaidComplexity, MermaidConfig, MermaidDiagramIr,
-    MermaidFidelity, MermaidGlyphMode, MermaidGuardReport, MermaidLayoutDecisionAlternative,
-    MermaidLayoutDecisionLedger, MermaidLayoutDecisionRecord, MermaidPressureReport,
-    MermaidPressureTier, Span,
+    MermaidGuardReport, MermaidLayoutDecisionAlternative, MermaidLayoutDecisionLedger,
+    MermaidLayoutDecisionRecord, MermaidPressureReport, MermaidPressureTier, Span,
 };
 use tracing::{debug, info, trace, warn};
 
@@ -9115,18 +9114,29 @@ pub fn build_layout_guard_report_with_pressure(
     let budget_exceeded = guard.time_budget_exceeded
         || guard.iteration_budget_exceeded
         || guard.route_budget_exceeded;
+    let node_limit_exceeded = ir.nodes.len() > max_nodes;
+    let edge_limit_exceeded = ir.edges.len() > max_edges;
+
+    let degradation = fm_core::compute_degradation_plan(&fm_core::DegradationContext {
+        pressure_tier: pressure.tier,
+        route_budget_exceeded: guard.route_budget_exceeded,
+        layout_budget_exceeded: guard.iteration_budget_exceeded,
+        time_budget_exceeded: guard.time_budget_exceeded,
+        node_limit_exceeded,
+        edge_limit_exceeded,
+    });
 
     MermaidGuardReport {
         complexity,
         label_chars_over,
         label_lines_over,
-        node_limit_exceeded: ir.nodes.len() > max_nodes,
-        edge_limit_exceeded: ir.edges.len() > max_edges,
+        node_limit_exceeded,
+        edge_limit_exceeded,
         label_limit_exceeded: label_chars_over > 0 || label_lines_over > 0,
         route_budget_exceeded: guard.route_budget_exceeded,
         layout_budget_exceeded: guard.time_budget_exceeded || guard.iteration_budget_exceeded,
-        limits_exceeded: ir.nodes.len() > max_nodes
-            || ir.edges.len() > max_edges
+        limits_exceeded: node_limit_exceeded
+            || edge_limit_exceeded
             || label_chars_over > 0
             || label_lines_over > 0,
         budget_exceeded,
@@ -9139,18 +9149,7 @@ pub fn build_layout_guard_report_with_pressure(
         observability: fm_core::MermaidObservabilityIds::default(),
         pressure,
         budget_broker: fm_core::MermaidBudgetLedger::default(),
-        degradation: fm_core::MermaidDegradationPlan {
-            target_fidelity: if budget_exceeded {
-                MermaidFidelity::Compact
-            } else {
-                MermaidFidelity::Normal
-            },
-            hide_labels: false,
-            collapse_clusters: false,
-            simplify_routing: guard.route_budget_exceeded,
-            reduce_decoration: budget_exceeded,
-            force_glyph_mode: budget_exceeded.then_some(MermaidGlyphMode::Ascii),
-        },
+        degradation,
     }
 }
